full_video_sequence_variations.purpose: Alternative complete movement structures for Grok image-to-video fashion generation using a base image.
full_video_sequence_variations.selection_instruction: Use only sequence_03_silhouette_showcase. Do not combine it with another sequence.

variations.name: Subtle silhouette showcase
variations.best_for: Outfits where the fit, body shape, waistline or overall silhouette matters.

timeline.action: The subject begins facing the camera with a calm neutral expression.
She gently rotates her torso a few degrees to one side, enough to show the outfit silhouette.
One hand naturally rests on the waist while the other remains relaxed.
She returns slightly toward the camera and takes one small step forward.
She lightly touches or smooths the existing side/front fabric area, preserving the original clothing design.
She makes a very subtle hip shift and natural posture adjustment.
She looks back at the camera with a brief soft smile, then relaxes her face naturally.

variations.expression_behavior: Calm and neutral for most of the video, with only one brief soft smile near the end.
